fields.label: Intune device name
fields.collector:
$key = Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Enrollments' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName -eq 'MS DM Server' } | Select-Object -First 1
if ($key) { (Get-ItemProperty -LiteralPath "Registry::$key" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).EntDeviceName }

fields.label: Intune device id
fields.collector:
$key = Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Enrollments' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName -eq 'MS DM Server' } | Select-Object -First 1
if ($key) { (Get-ItemProperty -LiteralPath "Registry::$key" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).EntDMID }

column.name: IntuneDeviceId
column.description: Intune device id / managed device GUID shown in the Intune portal (Enrollments\MS DM Server\EntDMID).

fields.label: Entra device id

column.name: EntraDeviceId
column.description: Entra device id resolved from the MS-Organization-Access join certificate.

column.name: EntraTenantId
column.description: Entra tenant id the device is joined to (CloudDomainJoin\TenantInfo key name).
